case_title: CHOW, DENNIS et al vs. COLLAR, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, DENNIS MONDY, REGINALD AS TO DEFENDANT COLLAR, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-30-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-01-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-12-1995
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-30-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-29-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 COURT DECLARES ACTION AN "UNINSURED MOTORIST" ACTION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-29-1995, CONTINUED TO FEB-01-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ARBITRATION RESULTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-01-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-01-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ON CALENDAR FOR: FAILURE TO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY; AND FOR ANSWER, PROOF OF SERVICE OR DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER TEMPORARY EXEMPTION-UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, DENNIS MONDY, REGINALD
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, DENNIS MONDY, REGINALD
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-08-1996, OFF CALENDAR
